question: How many months have passed since I last visited a museum with a friend?
reasoning_summary: The last museum visit with a friend was on 2022-10-22 (Science Museum with a chemistry professor friend). The question date is 2023-03-25. The difference in months from October 2022 to March 2023 is 5 months.

required_slots.name: date of last museum visit with friend

slots.name: date of last museum visit with friend
slots.query: last museum visit with friend date

verification.reason: specialist correctly identifies the last museum visit with a friend (Science Museum on 2022-10-22) and computes 5 months elapsed. p7 uses an incorrect date (Natural History Museum with dad) and returns days instead of months. p5 cannot determine the date.
